nextAction: Upload record share image: set VITE_SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY first.
copyText:
Kickoff Lock Agent public sharing production bootstrap
Mode: plan
Stages: 2/5 ready or done
Missing env: VITE_SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
Next action: Upload record share image: set VITE_SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY first.
Commands:
- bun run share:upload-image
- bun run share:upload-image -- --kind=mode --file=public/generated/kickoff-production-mode-share.png
- bun run doctor:sharing
Stages:
- Generate record share image [done]
  command: bun run share:production-image
  execute: bun run share:production-image
  requires: VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL
  missing: none
  outputs: public/generated/kickoff-production-share.png, KICKOFF_SEED_SHARE_IMAGE_URL, KICKOFF_VERIFY_SHARE_IMAGE_URL
  detail: Record proof PNG already exists in public/generated.
- Generate mode share image [done]
  command: bun run share:production-image -- --kind=mode --out=public/generated/kickoff-production-mode-share.png
  execute: bun run share:production-image -- --kind=mode --out=public/generated/kickoff-production-mode-share.png
  requires: VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL
  missing: none
  outputs: public/generated/kickoff-production-mode-share.png, KICKOFF_SEED_MODE_SHARE_IMAGE_URL, KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_SHARE_IMAGE_URL
  detail: Mode proof PNG already exists in public/generated.
- Upload record share image [blocked]
  command: bun run share:upload-image
  execute: bun run share:upload-image
  requires: VITE_SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, public/generated/kickoff-production-share.png
  missing: VITE_SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
  outputs: KICKOFF_SEED_SHARE_IMAGE_URL, KICKOFF_VERIFY_SHARE_IMAGE_URL
  detail: Record share image URL is present but is not valid production Supabase Storage evidence.
- Upload mode share image [blocked]
  command: bun run share:upload-image -- --kind=mode --file=public/generated/kickoff-production-mode-share.png
  execute: bun run share:upload-image -- --kind=mode --file=public/generated/kickoff-production-mode-share.png
  requires: VITE_SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, public/generated/kickoff-production-mode-share.png
  missing: VITE_SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
  outputs: KICKOFF_SEED_MODE_SHARE_IMAGE_URL, KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_SHARE_IMAGE_URL
  detail: Mode share image URL is present but is not valid production Supabase Storage evidence.
- Verify public sharing surfaces [blocked]
  command: bun run doctor:sharing
  execute: bun run doctor:sharing
  requires: VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL, KICKOFF_VERIFY_PROFILE_ID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_PROOF_ID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_IDS, KICKOFF_VERIFY_SHARE_IMAGE_URL, KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_SHARE_IMAGE_URL
  missing: VITE_SUPABASE_URL
  outputs: public proof/profile/mode render evidence, public image read-back evidence
  detail: Render deployed profile, proof and mode pages; verify canonical URLs, social metadata, JSON-LD and public share image reads.
